heading: Contributions by State, municipality, etc.
label: 395 Contributions by State, municipality, etc.
text: All moneys received after , from any State, municipality, corporation, association, firm, district, or individual for investigations, surveys, construction work, or any other development work incident thereto involving operations similar to those provided for by the reclamation law shall be covered into the reclamation fund and shall be available for expenditure for the purposes for which contributed in like manner as if said sums had been specifically appropriated for said purposes.March 4, 1921
notes: References in TextThe reclamation law, referred to in text, is identified in , , under the heading “”, as , , and Acts amendatory thereof or supplementary thereto. Act , popularly known as the Reclamation Act, is classified generally to this chapter.
